title: Silhouette Portrait Giveaway
excerpt: It's been a while since our designs have hit the Silhouette store , but I was delighted to see on Instagram that some fun shapes from Ready Set Go and Yes, Please have appeared. You can find a bunch of…
body:
It's been a while since our designs have hit the Silhouette store, but I was delighted to see on Instagram that some fun shapes from Ready Set Go and Yes, Please have appeared. You can find a bunch of American Crafts designs in the Silhouette Store.

Visit Silhouette and use the promo code: TANGERINE through March 8 to get any of these:(1)    1 Silhouette Portrait™ and the Silhouette Studio® Designer Edition Software for $179.99 (2)    1 Silhouette CAMEO® and the Silhouette Studio® Designer Edition Software for $269.99 (3)    The Silhouette Studio® Designer Edition Software for $24.99

These are some great products! Please click here to take advantage of this month’s discount and don’t forget to enter TANGERINE as the promo code valid through March 8.

Now for the really fun part! While talking to them about doing this promotion, they assumed I had a Cameo or Portrait. Well, as it turns out, I still have my SD from a couple years ago and it still works great and saves space. So instead of them sending me one, I asked if one of my lovely readers (you, yes you!) could get one instead. And guess what? They said yes. Silhouette wants to give one of you - my dear readers - a Silhouette Portrait!

GIVEAWAY IS NOW CLOSED. To enter: Leave a comment about the little things you enjoy. Giveaway will close on Monday, March 4th at 7am and a random winner will be selected and announced here shortly after.  Good luck everyone! 

LOVED reading all of these, thanks to everyone who commented. Really impressed with some of the men who entered for their wives/loved ones!

The winner is: #382 rebecca r says: March 3, 2013 at 2:38 pm (Edit)

I enjoy spending time with my family, being creative and little surprises. I also love my dog and I just started learning to cook. CONGRATS!
